name: New Classic Pizza Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the yeast and sugar with the warm water in a bowl. Let stand for 10 minutes until bubbly.
2. Measure the dry ingredients into the bowl of a food processor.
3. Stir the milk into the yeast mixture.
4. Turn on the food processor and pour in the yeast mixture, then the oil. Process until the dough has massed around the blade.
5. The dough will be soft. Allow it to rest for 5 minutes.
6. Turn on the food processor for a few seconds more (no more than 5).
7. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead by hand about 60 strokes.
8. Let the dough rise in a covered bowl until doubled (about 1 hour).
9. Divide the dough into two. The dough may be kept covered in a cool place for up to an hour, used immediately, refrigerated, or frozen.
